## Notes

- Primary selectors use `[data-w-id="..."]` which Webflow generates and is stable across deploys
- Some elements contain `<br>` tags for line breaks — ab-test.js uses innerHTML for those elements
- CTA buttons share the same text but have different node IDs (two instances on the page)
- The comparison section has two columns: "Other Platforms" (red X items) and "Homegrown" (green check items)
